query:
INSERT INTO deals (dealId, orgId, companyName, industry, stage, payload, isDemo, isTest, version, createdByOpenId, updatedByOpenId, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (
  'demo-summit-hvac',
  1,
  'Summit HVAC Services',
  'HVAC',
  'Under Analysis',
  '{
    "id": "demo-summit-hvac",
    "companyName": "Summit HVAC Services",
    "industry": "HVAC",
    "location": "Denver, CO",
    "stage": "Under Analysis",
    "annualRevenue": 2500000,
    "annualSDE": 450000,
    "annualEBITDA": 375000,
    "askingPrice": 1800000,
    "ownerRole": "Owner-operator, handles all major client relationships and bids",
    "revenueTrend": "growing",
    "customerConcentrationPct": 22,
    "recurringRevenuePct": 40,
    "employeeCount": 14,
    "yearsInBusiness": 11,
    "geography": "Colorado Front Range",
    "dealStructure": "asset",
    "riskInputs": {
      "financialStabilityRisk": 2,
      "customerConcentrationRisk": 3,
      "ownerDependencyRisk": 4,
      "industryRisk": 2,
      "operationalComplexityRisk": 3
    },
    "diligence": {
      "taxReturnsReceived": true,
      "pnlReceived": true,
      "balanceSheetReceived": true,
      "cashFlowStatementReceived": false,
      "addBacksDocumented": true,
      "customerListReceived": true,
      "contractsReceived": false,
      "employeeRosterReceived": true,
      "leaseReviewed": false,
      "debtScheduleReceived": false,
      "qoeComplete": false
    },
    "addBackItems": [
      {"label": "Owner salary above market", "amount": 85000, "category": "owner_comp", "documented": true, "rationale": "Owner draws $185K; market replacement ~$100K"},
      {"label": "Personal vehicle (owner truck)", "amount": 18000, "category": "discretionary", "documented": true, "rationale": "Truck used <20% for business per owner"},
      {"label": "One-time legal settlement", "amount": 32000, "category": "one_time", "documented": true, "rationale": "Resolved vendor dispute, non-recurring"}
    ],
    "notes": "Strong residential + light commercial mix. Owner has been sole estimator for 11 years — succession plan is the key diligence risk. Service territory covers Denver metro and Boulder corridor. Fleet of 6 vans, all 2020 or newer.",
    "isDemo": true,
    "isTest": false,
    "createdAt": "2026-04-10T14:00:00.000Z",
    "updatedAt": "2026-05-01T09:30:00.000Z"
  }',
  1,
  0,
  1,
  'HH9R8dErn8y8z3SgbFd7PD',
  'HH9R8dErn8y8z3SgbFd7PD',
  '2026-04-10 14:00:00',
  '2026-05-01 09:30:00'
);
